description_long: This is a medium-sized lotion bottle with a semi-opaque, frosted body and a black plastic pump dispenser on top. The bottle features a wraparound label with a combination of teal, blue, and cream colors, including abstract floral or botanical patterns and various blocks of text. The front of the bottle displays a large stylized number and the volume marking '250ml' near the base. The back and sides of the label contain product information, instructions, and symbols, with a barcode and recycling icons visible. The pump mechanism is cylindrical and ribbed for grip, with a flat, wide actuator for easy pressing. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for display in bathrooms, salons, or urban public restrooms.
description: A frosted lotion bottle with a black pump dispenser and a teal floral-patterned label, featuring product details and a 250ml marking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label with a large stylized number, floral graphics, and the '250ml' marking.
description_view_1: Side view revealing more product information, a barcode, and teal label details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying extensive product text, recycling symbols, and a prominent teal background.
description_view_3: Side-back view highlighting the abstract floral pattern and the continuation of the label design.
